parameters.name: get_public_holidays
parameters.description: Get public holidays for a country. Parameters: country_code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, e.g. DE, US, AT, CH, FR), year (optional, default current year), mode (optional: 'year' for full year or 'next' for upcoming holidays only)

value.country_code: ={{ $fromAI('country_code', 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. DE, US, AT)', 'string') }}
value.year: ={{ $fromAI('year', 'Year for holidays (e.g. 2026). Optional, defaults to current year', 'string') }}
value.mode: ={{ $fromAI('mode', 'Mode: year (full year) or next (upcoming only). Optional, default year', 'string') }}

schema.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. DE, US, AT)
Year for holidays (e.g. 2026). Optional, defaults to current year
Mode: year (full year) or next (upcoming only). Optional, default year
